summary: A clip from a Fox News segment about law-enforcement raids in Minnesota. It opens with an anchor at a desk in front of a city skyline, with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner and a lower-third reading NOW: RAIDS TARGETING FRAUD UNDERWAY IN MINNESOTA. The segment cuts to outdoor footage marked MINNEAPOLIS showing parked SUVs and officers near a fenced lot, and the exterior of a building with a doorway numbered 1411 NICOLLET SUITE 8.

script.scene: An anchor speaks at a desk in front of a city skyline; lower-third reads NOW: RAIDS TARGETING FRAUD UNDERWAY IN MINNESOTA.
Outdoor footage marked MINNEAPOLIS shows officers and parked SUVs beside a fenced lot.
Footage shows the exterior of a building with a doorway numbered 1411 NICOLLET SUITE 8.

notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; NOW: RAIDS TARGETING FRAUD UNDERWAY IN MINNESOTA; DALLAS; MINNEAPOLIS; 1411 NICOLLET SUITE 8
